zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Stuteville於1088年出生時，她的父親Robert de Stuteville III13歲，母親Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith9歲。她於1120年之前與Michael le Fleming在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她埋葬在英國波藍德希拉斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Stuteville于1088年出生时，她的父亲Robert de Stuteville III13岁，母亲Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith9岁。她于1120年之前与Michael le Fleming在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她埋葬在英国波藍德希拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: Stuteville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Estouteville or Etoutteville in Seine-Maritime.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Stuteville was born in 1088, her father, Robert de Stuteville III, was 13 and her mother, Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, was 9. She married Michael le Fleming before 1120, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She was buried in Silloth, Cumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Stuteville est née en 1088, son père, Robert de Stuteville III, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, avait 9 ans. Elle a épousé Michael le Fleming avant 1120, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elleenterrée à Silloth, Cumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Stuteville 1088 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Stuteville III 13 und ihre Mutter Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith 9. Sie hat vor 1120 in England Michael le Fleming geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie wurde in Silloth, Cumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Stuteville è nata il nel 1088, sua padre, Robert de Stuteville III, aveva 13 anni e sua madre, Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, aveva 9 anni. Lei sposato Michael le Fleming prima del 1120, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Fu sepolta a Silloth, Cumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Stutevilleが1088年に生まれた時，父Robert de Stuteville IIIは13歳，母Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwithは9歳であった。1120年以前にイギリスでMichael le Flemingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスクウンバーランドシロスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Stuteville(이)가 1088년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Stuteville III(은)는 13세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith(은)는 9세였다. 그녀는 1120년 이전 영국에서 Michael le Fleming(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 쿠벌랜드 시로스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Stuteville nasceu em 1088, seu pai, Robert de Stuteville III, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, tinha 9 anos. Ela casou-se com Michael le Fleming antes 1120, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela foi sepultada em Silloth, Cumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Stuteville родилась в 1088 г., её отцу по имени Robert de Stuteville III было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, 9. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Michael le Fleming перед 1120 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она была похоронена в местности силлот, кумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Stuteville nació en 1088, su papá, Robert de Stuteville III, tenía 13 años y su mamá, Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, tenía 9 años. Se casó con Michael le Fleming antes de 1120, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Fue sepultada en Silloth, Cumberland, Inglaterra.
